name: Cross-Pollinator Engine
tagline: 138K-line cross-venture synergy engine — discovers hidden connections between 37 revenue verticals for compounding returns
description: Analyzes all 37 revenue verticals for cross-pollination opportunities. Content feeds newsletters feeds flash sales feeds apps feeds community feeds outreach. Stacked Revenue = Sum(Individual) x Synergy Multiplier (1.3-2.5x). The difference between running 37 separate businesses and running one system that compounds.
content_angles: Discovers hidden synergies between independent business verticals
